title: Opening for Store Manager at Barista Global Group

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Barista Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Barista Global Group in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Barista Global Group:
Barista Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista Global Group!
